README.md:
# T3 Stack Starter

Generated with [Scaffinity](https://github.com/devi5040/scaffinity).

## Getting Started

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

This blueprint includes a minimal Next.js App Router surface wired to tRPC, Auth.js/NextAuth route handlers, Prisma, TailwindCSS, and TanStack Query.

## Included Stack Files

- `src/server/api/trpc.ts` and `src/server/api/root.ts` define the tRPC context, router, and procedures.
- `src/app/api/trpc/[trpc]/route.ts` exposes the App Router tRPC endpoint.
- `src/server/auth/config.ts`, `src/server/auth/index.ts`, and `src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts` wire Auth.js/NextAuth.
- `src/trpc/react.tsx` provides the React tRPC and TanStack Query client provider.
- `tailwind.config.ts`, `postcss.config.mjs`, and `src/styles/globals.css` set up TailwindCSS.

  "name": "t3-stack-starter",

  "scripts": {

    "@prisma/client": "latest",

tsconfig.json:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "es2020",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "~/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}
